name: oscar-baselines-mcp
description: Quality-baseline tracker MCP for Oscar GC's Lavern partners. Adapter lift of Lavern's baselines.ts (Apache-2.0; commit 7c2efe61) — decoupled from SessionReportCard consumption. Tools: record_observation, list_baselines, get_baseline, check_against_baseline. Baselines persist to OSCAR_BASELINES_DIR if set, otherwise in-memory only.
author: s-arturko
